features.name: interface extending interface with modport parameter
features.description: Code should include an interface that extends another interface by passing a modport as a parameter

features.name: task automatic inside interface
features.description: Code should include an automatic task defined inside an interface that modifies modport signals

features.name: interface task call from module always block
features.description: Code should include a module always block that calls interface tasks through interface instance connections

features.name: multiple interface instances with modport connections
features.description: Code should include multiple interface instances connected via different modport types to different base interfaces
